title: Cancellation Policy
content:
CANCELLATION POLICY

Effective Date: 01 January 2026


This Cancellation Policy ("Policy") is issued by Quick Spicy ("Company", "Quick Spicy", "we", "our", or "us") and forms an integral part of the Terms and Conditions governing the use of the Quick Spicy Platform. This Policy sets out the terms and conditions governing the cancellation of orders placed through the Quick Spicy mobile application, website, WhatsApp, telephone orders, or any other platform authorized by the Company.


By placing an order through the Quick Spicy Platform, the Customer acknowledges that they have read, understood, and agreed to be legally bound by this Cancellation Policy.


Order Cancellation

Customers may cancel their order within **one (1) minute** from the time the order is successfully placed through the Quick Spicy Platform. If the order is cancelled within this period and the Restaurant Partner has not commenced preparation or accepted the order, the Customer shall be eligible to receive a **100% refund** of the amount paid.


Upon expiry of the one (1) minute cancellation window, or once the Restaurant Partner has accepted the order or commenced food preparation, the order shall ordinarily become **non-cancellable**. In such cases, no refund shall be payable except where cancellation is required under applicable law or expressly approved by Quick Spicy at its sole discretion.


Quick Spicy reserves the right to cancel any order at any time due to reasons including, but not limited to, restaurant closure, food unavailability, operational issues, payment verification failure, technical errors, suspected fraudulent activity, force majeure events, or circumstances beyond the reasonable control of the Company. Where payment has already been received for an order cancelled by Quick Spicy for reasons attributable to the Company or its authorized partners, the applicable refund shall be processed in accordance with the Company's Refund Policy.


The Company reserves the right to refuse repeated cancellation requests, suspend customer accounts, or take appropriate legal action where cancellation privileges are misused, fraudulent transactions are identified, or the Customer is found to be acting in violation of the Company's Terms and Conditions.


Any refund arising from an approved cancellation shall ordinarily be processed to the original payment method or the Quick Spicy Wallet, as applicable, within **5 to 7 business days**, subject to processing timelines of the respective bank, payment gateway, or financial institution.


This Cancellation Policy shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Republic of India. Any dispute arising out of or relating to this Policy shall be subject to the jurisdiction of the competent courts in Andhra Pradesh, India, without prejudice to the statutory rights available to consumers under applicable law.
